title: The Great Crocodile Trap Flop
cover_description: A giant, spaghetti-tied net dangles from a tree, with a tangled, upside-down crocodile stuck inside it while a tiny mouse points and giggles below.
script:
[TITLE: The Great Crocodile Trap Flop]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: comedic_villain, high_pitch_cartoon]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, triumphant] I am Croc the Mighty! [STING: villain_entrance]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: bluster] I will trap that tiny mouse! [STING: buildup_short]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious] Uh-oh. What’s that big green thing blocking the path? [STING: mouse_squeak]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: smug] Behold! My trap of doom! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Why is it wobbling like jelly? [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: dismissive] Step on it, fool! [STING: slide_whistle]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] I’m stepping… I’m sinking! [STING: splat]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Wait—why am I sinking too?! [STING: boing]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: scrambling] I built a *trampoline* of doom! [STING: buildup_long]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Why does it bounce us higher? [STING: whoosh]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate] Jump off! Jump off! [STING: run]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: delighted] Wheee! We’re flying! [STING: big_crash]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: stunned] I’m stuck in a tree! [STING: deflation]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate] I’ll build a *net* of doom! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha] Oh no. Not again. [STING: silence]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Now I’ve got you! [STING: medium_hit]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: quiet] …Why is the net full of holes? [STING: tiny]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: deflated] I tied it with spaghetti. [STING: villain_fail]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: excited, loud] [PUNCHLINE]Look! You trapped *yourself* in your own net![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: victory]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: devastated] …I am Croc the *Mistake*. [STING: deflation]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A giant, spaghetti-tied net dangles from a tree, with a tangled, upside-down crocodile stuck inside it while a tiny mouse points and giggles below.]
[PREMISE: Crocodile’s traps backfire spectacularly]
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy builds the perfect trap for Pip. It is not perfect.
host_outro: Boomy is stuck in his own spaghetti net. He says it is Italian engineering.
